Title: Atlas of Qud
Description: This mod is a cartographic assistant to map your journey through the Caves of Qud. The Atlas of Qud contains a map of every area you visit, while preserving explored status. Not to mention the Atlas features a pull-up world map that pinpoints your location even in the subterranean depths. See the Caves of Qud from a new perspective!
Author: 2DruNk2FraG
